title: Set Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) Header
description:
Configure the Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) response header to enforce HTTPS connections and prevent protocol downgrade attacks.

## Required Header

```
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload
```

This can be set via `.htaccess`, server configuration, or application middleware. The `max-age` of 31536000 seconds (1 year) tells browsers to always use HTTPS for the domain and all subdomains.
acceptance_criteria: Strict-Transport-Security header is set on all HTTPS responses
Header includes max-age=31536000, includeSubDomains, and preload directives
Header is applied consistently across all application routes
implementation_notes: Infrastructure-level configuration task assigned to Ryan. Developer offered to implement via code snippet but was told it's an infrastructure task.
comment_summary: Developer offered to implement via code. Product owner confirmed this is an infrastructure task assigned to himself.
